text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of her debut arrives, but with everyone
fussing over her, Sweep Tosho ends up feeling
mollycoddled and frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make matters worse, moments before the
race, a fussy phone call from her father sparks an
explosion of anger. I feel worried as I send Sweep
Tosho off to race.
